free_text: Inelastic proton scattering to the positive-parity
Two pairs of vertical drift chambers (VDC) located
near the MRS focal plane and a low-pressure multiwire
front-end chamber (FEC) located upstream of the MRS
The beam polarisation was continuously monitored on
an in-beam CH2 polarimeter and was typically 0.75,
with an overall uncertainty of less than 0.02.
Overall absolute errors of 12% in the
extracted cross sections are due mainly to solid angle
and target thickness uncertainties (these are not
included in the error bars in the figures).
SD: page of the ref. corrected. BIB update
